# brush-bin

https://github.com/reubeno/brush

`brush` is a modern bash- and POSIX- compatible shell written in Rust. Run your existing scripts and .bashrc unchanged -- with syntax highlighting and auto-suggestions built in.

[![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/0e64d1b9-7e4e-43be-8593-6c1b9607ac52)](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/10508433/404689022-0e64d1b9-7e4e-43be-8593-6c1b9607ac52.gif?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..Me2qai5qwFJZwtI1gq4c2tXCd8ni0EprUOEbjzsSTWY)

## install

```sh
pip install brush-bin
```
